# Garmin AI Export

Garmin AI Export は、Garmin Connect からエクスポートした活動・睡眠・健康データの ZIP ファイルを、ChatGPT / Gemini / Claude などの AI が読み込みやすい CSV ファイルに変換するブラウザ完結の Web アプリです。

## Main Features

- Converts Garmin Connect ZIP exports in the browser.
- Generates activities.csv, sleep.csv, daily_health.csv, and laps.csv.
- Keeps health and activity data on the user's device during conversion.
- Produces a ZIP bundle suitable for upload to ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, or other AI analysis tools.

## Privacy

Garmin data is parsed locally in the browser. The uploaded ZIP and generated CSV files are not sent to Garmin AI Export servers for conversion.

## Price

Download fee: ¥300. Apple Pay and Google Pay are supported through Square checkout.

## Canonical URL

https://garmin-ai-export.vercel.app/
